title: Global Sports Report
tagline: Built for journalists, by a journalist.
headline: TTU's Brendan Sorsby hires attorney to seek to regain NCAA eligibility
snapshot: Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby, who is under NCAA investigation for making bets via a gambling app, has retained the noted lawyer Jeffrey Kessler to try to regain his college eligibility, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter and Pete Thamel.
key_storylines: Breaking Sports News: TTU's Brendan Sorsby hires attorney to seek to regain NCAA eligibility

advanced: Stories are elevated when news terms such as fired, traded, injured, suspended, hired, investigation, playoff or draft appear in trusted sports feeds.
This card is designed to override stale scoreboard-only hierarchy when major news breaks.
why_it_matters: Breaking Sports News postseason context raises urgency because every result affects matchups, pressure and availability.
story_angles: What changed since the last site update?

journalist_toolkit.title: Journalist Toolkit
journalist_toolkit.snapshot: Fast-access reporting resources for sports journalists.

automation_status.purpose: Forces a visible file change every run so GitHub, Vercel and the live site do not stay frozen when upstream sports data is quiet.

focus: Separate live newsroom and editor signal modules
Freshness gate for stale league reports
